title: BAE Systems And General Dynamics: Ukraine, Your Tanks Are Here!
text: Defense equipment sent to Ukraine is becoming more and more advanced. NATO intends to send 80 to 90 tanks of which 73 are already committed.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Arm Wins Deal to Support Abrams Tank
text: General Dynamics' (GD) business unit clinches a $47.6-million contract to provide technical support for Abrams main battle tanks.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Q4 Earnings: How Key Metrics Compare to Wall Street Estimates
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for General Dynamics (GD) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended December 2022, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: General Dynamics Corporation (GD) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD ) Q4 2022 Results Conference Call January 25, 2023 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Howard Rubel - Vice President of Investor Relations Phebe Novakovic - Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Jason Aiken - CFO Conference Call Participants Myles Walton - Wolf Research David Strauss - Barclays Seth Seifman - JPMorgan Peter Arment - Baird Ron Epstein - Bank of America Jason Gursky - Citi Cai von Rumohr - Cowen Pete Skibitski - Alembic Global Sheila Kahyaoglu - Jefferies Ken Herbert - RBC Robert Stallard - Vertical Research Scott Deuschle - Credit Suisse Robert Spingarn - Melius Research Operator Good morning, and welcome to the General Dynamics Q4 2022 Conference Call. All participants will be in listen only mode.

title: General Dynamics' (GD) Q4 Earnings Top, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: General Dynamics' (GD) Q4 revenues of $10,851 million beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $10,674 million by 1.7%. Revenues also improve 5.4% from the year-ago quarter.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: General Dynamics (GD) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 1.42% and 1.66%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD Methodology - Slow And Steady
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Solid Sales Performance to Aid General Dynamics (GD) Q4 Earnings
text: General Dynamics' (GD) Q4 results are likely to reflect solid sales performance across most of its segments, outweighing headwinds like supply-chain disruption, labor shortage and inflation.

title: Blue-Chip Stocks And Red Flags - Things To Consider In Your Due Diligence
text: Investing in blue-chip companies that pay dividends and relentlessly focusing on reinvesting the proceeds is a proven strategy for reliable long-term returns. But what about the occasional black swan? Potentially devastating litigation? Overlooked liabilities on the balance sheet? Financial engineering?

title: The 3 Best Books on Investing to Read in 2023
text: The markets in 2023 will likely be as unpredictable as what we saw last year. Accordingly, for those looking to prepare for volatility on the horizon, arming oneself with the appropriate tools is always a great place to start.
